moderation.description: Review platform content and keep the community healthy

list.emptyDescription: There are no posts waiting for moderation. New reports will appear here.

settings.title: Moderation Settings
settings.description: Configure automation thresholds, workflow constraints, and default penalties.

auto_hide_report_threshold.label: Auto-hide threshold
auto_hide_report_threshold.description: Content is automatically marked high priority when report count reaches this value.

require_note_on_reject.label: Require rejection note
require_note_on_reject.description: Moderators should leave a note when rejecting or removing content.

allow_moderator_claim.label: Allow queue claiming
allow_moderator_claim.description: Moderators can claim and release records in the moderation queue.

default_mute_hours.label: Default mute duration
default_mute_hours.description: Default number of hours for user mute actions.

spam.title: Spam / ads
spam.description: Contains commercial advertising, spam links, or duplicated content

harassment.title: Harassment
harassment.description: Malicious harassment or bullying targeting a specific user

hate.title: Hate speech
hate.description: Discriminatory language based on race, gender, religion, or similar traits

violence.title: Violent content
violence.description: Contains violent threats or graphic violent content

adult.title: Adult content
adult.description: Contains sexual content or content unsuitable for minors

placeholder.description: This feature is in development. Please check back later.

token.instructionsAuth: Calls an authenticated endpoint. If the Token is expired, it will refresh and retry automatically.
token.instructionsRefresh: Calls the refresh endpoint directly and updates the Token.
token.instructionsInvalidate: Modifies the Token to simulate an expiry scenario.
token.instructionsClear: Deletes all authentication information and requires login again.
token.tip: Open the browser console to inspect detailed refresh logs.
token.httpOnlyTamperUnavailable: Cannot tamper Token directly in HttpOnly Cookie mode

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Please read the following terms of service and privacy policy carefully.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using this service, you agree to comply with these terms. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use this service.

accounts.title: 2. Account Responsibilities
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security and confidentiality of your account information. Any activity conducted through your account will be deemed to be carried out by you.

conduct.title: 3. User Conduct
conduct.alertTitle: 3. Warning: Please note that you agree not to engage in any of the following behaviors, or you will bear corresponding responsibilities:
conduct.content: You agree not to engage in any behavior that may damage, disable, overburden, or interfere with this service.

termination.title: 4. Termination of Service
termination.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your access at any time, with or without notice.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Here are some frequently asked questions and their answers.

q1.question: Can I change my email address?
q1.answer: Yes, you can change your email address in your account settings.

q2.question: What should I do if I forget my password?
q2.answer: You can reset your password by clicking the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.

q3.question: How can I delete my account?
q3.answer: Please contact customer support to request account deletion.

actions.filterDescription: Switch account sections and jump directly to the content you need.

stats.followingDescription: View the people this user follows.
stats.likesDescription: View received likes and engagement statistics.
